rationale: In the citing paper, Luo, Raithel, and Wiles (2013) is explicitly cited as part of a grouped example of marketing-asset studies that use highly disaggregated (daily/weekly) data. The citation is not used to develop a focal hypothesis, define core constructs of the meta-analysis, or provide a distinct mechanism that the paper builds on. The text does not assign this specific study a unique functional role beyond illustrative methodological background.
